core_payload.content:
# AI Wallet

## 1. Role
AI Wallet will behave as a true portfolio manager for intelligence access inside N1Hub. Model supply will be managed as a governed system of credentials, subscriptions, hosted lanes, and routing metadata rather than as a loose drawer of unrelated keys.

## 2. Future Portfolio Contract
- API providers, hosted model lanes, and subscription lanes managed as one coherent portfolio
- stronger provider health and readiness visibility before long background work starts
- clearer routing posture across day co-pilot, night autonomy, batch windows, and premium reasoning lanes
- safer support for local ChatGPT or Codex access without exposing raw credential plumbing in ordinary surfaces
- tighter linkage between wallet state, assignment classes, control-plane budgets, and runtime policy

## 3. Operational Consequence
Background and foreground work will choose the right lane from explicit supply metadata instead of improvisation. Ownership, secrecy, health, routing, and budget posture will remain visible enough for real autonomous work.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
AI Wallet supports To Dig Deep by letting users bring intelligence supply into a sovereign workspace without losing routing discipline, secrecy, or control.

neuro_concentrate.summary: AI Wallet defines the future governed intelligence portfolio of N1Hub: healthier provider readiness, clearer routing across API, hosted, and subscription lanes, assignment-aware metadata, and tighter linkage between wallet state, control surfaces, and runtime policy.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
